/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/test/test_metrics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/src/crossover_filter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/src/high_band.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/src/low_band.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/src/exciter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_metrics.dir/src/exciter_metrics.cpp.o -o test_metrics  -lsndfile -lm
